plugin.name: YouTubeMusic
plugin.title: YouTube Music
plugin.desc: Browse, search, and stream YouTube Music to your Squeezebox players.
plugin.changes: Fixed direct streaming to players on separate machines — stream URL now uses the real LMS server IP instead of 127.0.0.1, so hardware players like Transporter can fetch streams directly when LMS chooses direct streaming mode.
plugin.creator: schmij97
